layman_headline: Extreme Fear across crypto creates a contrarian buy window in a beaten-down token with massive upside room.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is gripped by extreme fear (25/100), but Bitcoin just bounced 3.5% in 24 hours toward $65K on cooling inflation data. This fear often marks bottoms where smart money accumulates. Pump.fun (PUMP) has been crushed 81% from its all-time high but is showing early signs of a reversal — a strong bullish candle pattern and a risk/reward ratio of over 4:1 to resistance. The setup is speculative but the math favors the trade if Bitcoin stabilizes.
layman_action: Consider a small position in PUMP with a tight stop-loss at $0.00125. This is a high-risk, high-reward play — only allocate money you can afford to lose. If PUMP doesn't hold above $0.0013 support, exit immediately.
expert_reasoning: PUMP presents an asymmetric setup: RSI at 41.15 is approaching oversold (reliable signal per our 80% win rate history), the Bullish Marubozu candle on the daily shows pure buying conviction with minimal wicks, and the risk/reward to nearest support/resistance is 4.12x — far superior to all other candidates. The 12.18% 24h move with chart support at $0.0013 and resistance at $0.0022 provides clear trade parameters. The main concern is the overall downtrend and bearish structure (below all MAs), but the extreme fear reading of 25 — which has a 71% win rate in our signal history — combined with BTC's stabilization toward $65K creates the macro backdrop for mean-reversion plays. I'm sizing this as a small speculative position given the elevated risk profile.
risk_factors: PUMP is in a confirmed downtrend below all moving averages — this is a counter-trend trade that could fail if selling resumes
BTC dominance at 56.3% means capital is flowing to Bitcoin, not alts — PUMP could underperform even if BTC rallies
81% off ATH with low liquidity means the token could gap down sharply on any negative news or broader market selloff
watch_list: Bitcoin holding above $64,000 — if BTC breaks below, all alt positions are at risk
PUMP daily volume trend — need sustained volume to confirm the Marubozu pattern is genuine accumulation, not a one-day spike
Fear & Greed Index trajectory — currently improving from 22 to 25; a move above 30 would confirm sentiment shift and support the trade
market_context: BTC is bouncing toward $65K on US inflation relief, but the broader market remains in Extreme Fear (25/100). High BTC dominance at 56.3% is headwind for alts, though ETH's 5.2% daily gain suggests some risk-on rotation may be beginning.
context_banner: Extreme Fear with an improving trend and BTC stabilizing near $65K creates selective contrarian opportunities in deeply oversold tokens with asymmetric risk/reward.

key_signals.description: PUMP RSI at 41 approaching oversold territory — our most reliable signal with 80% win rate and +5.5% avg return historically.
Extreme Fear at 25/100 improving from 22 — contrarian indicator with 71% win rate in our track record suggesting accumulation zone.
Bitcoin pushing toward $65K on US inflation relief provides macro support for risk-on trades, though the relief may be fading.
PUMP shows Bullish Marubozu candle with 4.12x risk/reward ratio to nearest support/resistance — best asymmetric setup among all candidates.
Stablecoin infrastructure investment ($38M Velocity raise) and growing institutional crypto adoption signal continued sector growth despite fear.
